title: cyperus alatus subsp. alatus
intro: Cyperus alatus subsp. alatus, also known as the feathered flatsedge, is a type of sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that make it useful for treating wounds, infections, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Cyperus alatus subsp. alatus include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and acting as an antimicrobial agent to prevent the growth of bacteria and other pathogens. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat various health conditions.
